author: James Steele
review: I have lived at Regency Park Apartments since 2009. Have REALLY enjoyed the place. There is a swimming pool, a movie theatre, an office to use computers, and a great bunch of friendly neighbors! The office staff will bend over backwards to

ownerResponse.text: James, Thank you for the awesome feedback. We value your feedback and look forward to seeing you again soon! Please reach out to us with any additional questions or comments!

review: BEWARE! The new "head" of maintenance almost assaulted me in the parking lot near his Dodge Magnum. I had to make this private account because you can't complain anymore without being chastised (Julie is no longer here to take tenants

author: Hank Holland
review: Deneen is a manipulative, conniving lady. The new maintenance guy (dwarfish, red-bearded lumberjack) is the most DISRESPECTFUL, racist, rude person we've ever met. He is the reason we are reporting Regency to Tenants Revolt. He called us

author: Megan Phipps
review: I've had great experience with this complex so far! I haven't lived here long, but getting in was such a pleasant experience I absolutely love the ladies in the office. I had new carpets and hardwood when I moved in, loved it!

ownerResponse.text:
Megan,
Thank you for your kind review; we are happy to pass along your comments to the team here at Regency Park Apartments!
Regards,
Regency Park Management Team

author: Crysta Jameson
review: Staff very respectful and helpful, there is a Theater Room, workout Room, a swimming pool and a hot tub, which are definitely perks of being here, but not during a pandemic,

ownerResponse.text: Hi Crysta, Thank you for your kind review. We are happy to pass along your comments to our team! We appreciate knowing how we are doing. We do have awesome amenities here and are looking forward to reopening them when it is safer to do so while following the Washington State Safe Start Guidelines.Warm Regards,-Regency Park Management Team

author: Os Sht
review: I have lived here for almost three years now with my wife and kids. We have been blessed with living at regency park since day one. The staff in the front office is wonderful, the maintenance team is by far I've ever seen in any residence.

ownerResponse.text: Oleg, thank you so much for your very kind review. Reviews like this give us motivation and help us ensure we provide high-quality care. It is wonderful to know that we have had such a positive impact. Our team strives to deliver an excellent experience, and are glad you found this to be the case during your residency. -Regency Park Management Team

author: Cheri Cariveau
review: I have had some ups and some downs but all in all it is a great place to live and things get fixed fast and in a timely manner. Staff are great and maintenance are all polite. Been here for 4 years plus now.

ownerResponse.text:
Thank you for taking the time to let us know how we did. We hope you have a great day!

Best,
Regency Park Management

author: Janine Richardson
review: Nice apartment layout. Maintenance doesn't take very good care of property. Loose cement steps. Yes they know it's loose. As with most apartment complex rent is way too high

ownerResponse.text: Hi Janine,Thanks for leaving feedback and a star rating for our community. We are disappointed that your experience was not positive. Please feel free to contact us at the office at your earliest convenience. We would love to see if we can turn your experience around.Sincerely,-Regency Park Management Team

author: Craig Cunningham
review: The office opens very late and I wish they could open early. They open at 10! The management can invade your privacy, have many rules, make you sign papers throughout the whole lease period (multiple times), and not just once at the

author: Lisa Loomis
review: The management is very nice and they do a lot for the residents such as kids cookouts and have the ice cream shack come and they work with you and your financial situation.  Great place to live!

ownerResponse.text:
Hi Lisa,
Thank you for leaving us a review! We appreciate the kind words and hope we can continue to exceed your expectations.
Regards,
Regency Park Management

author: Lisa Sloan
review: I am a current resident. The apartments are managed very well. Any time I have submitted a maintenance request the request is always responded to within the time range they tell you they can get to it. The office staff are WONDERFUL! I've

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for your positive review!

author: Destiny Watson
review: Don't really recommend as a living place. The apartments are small and fairly dirty, the pool is gross and I'm not sure its cleaned as much as it should be. There's a park, I guess that's the most ok part of the place. There's also lots of addicts and bad people around there. Not very safe for kids either.

author: Anna shtey
review: Great People work here who really care. The staff is so nice and polite, truly heart warming. The buildings and outside areas are always so clean and maintained. I appreciate all the effort from these wonderful staff. Thank you so much!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Anna, We are so happy to read such a great review.  We are happy to pass along your comments to the team here at Regency Park!- HNN Communities Customer Service

author: Nathan Rowley
review: The apartments themselves are fine, and repairs were done on time.  Some of the management was more helpful than others.  The major problem is the noise level from the large amount of children, if you cannot deal with a ridiculous amount of

author: God Zilla
review:
I absolutely despise Regency for very good reasons and here's why.
1. Every few months the rent goes up more and more, and now Regency isn't so affordable anymore.

ownerResponse.text:
Hello -- Thanks for reaching us regarding Regency Park. I am sorry you do not have a positive review of Regency Park. I will be passing on your comments to the apartment manager at Regency Park. If you would like to discuss any of this further, please contact residents@hnnwa.com.

Thank you! HNN Resident Relations

author: Jimmy Sloan
review: This is temporary housing for older folks. But if you think about it, aren't we all temporary residents on planet earth?  OMG, I just had an existential crisis. I need a cheeseburger to forget this, and make me feel better.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Jimmy, We are very happy to have provided you with such a positive experience! Have a good day!Best,Regency Park

review: First off, the office staff is incompetent.  One in particular, Julie, is unprofessional and disrespectful.  She also lacks thorough knowledge of landlord tenant laws.  At one point, they attempted to charge us for trash removal from the

review: Great accommodations with amenities such as library, gym,pool and various group activities.Large complex.Locating specific apartment may be challenging; they all look the same from outside...worth the effort, though!
